_meta.purpose: Seed p_thesis (success probability) and L (loss-on-failure) priors for the VCI probability-weighted floor (E1) and sleeve risk budget (E4). Read fresh each run; NEVER hand-set at decision time. Overridden per (band, structure) by vci_learning's p_by_band / L_by_structure once the calibration gate passes (>=12 resolved outcomes).
_meta.review_cadence: annual, or when a category's evidence base shifts
_meta.confidence_flags: sourced = published external data; reasoned = analyst prior pending a fuller sourced pass
sources: Clinical development success rates by phase (2024): Phase 1 ~47%, Phase 2 ~28%, Phase 3 ~55%; Phase 2->3 transition ~34.5%; filed->approval ~92%; Phase 1 LOA ~6.7% (2014-2023). Norstella; Wong/Siah/Lo (Biostatistics 2019); BIO/Biomedtracker-lineage industry data.

Non-biotech categories: reasoned analyst priors. Web search (6-Jul-2026) confirmed semiconductor design-win->production-revenue CONVERSION rates are proprietary / not publicly quantified (design wins ~25% of industry value; timing risk noted; no public success-probability figure), so these remain first-principles reasoned: already-revenue names (revenue_scaling) get p 0.55-0.60 (past the binary), pre-revenue single-shot lower. Refine via the §13 learning loop once outcomes accrue.

single_asset/phase2_biotech.note: 2024 Phase 2 success ~28%; the binary readout the sleeve typically bets on

single_asset/regulatory_binary.note: filed->approval ~92%, but pre-filing regulatory bets are riskier; conservative 0.75

single_asset/product_launch.note: single-product launch/adoption execution; refine with sector launch data

single_asset/design_win_revenue.note: design-win -> production-revenue conversion for a single flagship program

single_asset/revenue_scaling.note: ALREADY generating revenue, single dominant product: past the binary; risk is growth magnitude not survival

platform/revenue_ramp.note: multi-shot platform (>=3 independent programs or a revenue cushion) ramping; diversification lifts thesis-success above a single trial

platform/regulatory.note: platform with a regulatory catalyst but multiple shots on goal

platform/design_win_revenue.note: platform with multiple design wins converting

platform/revenue_scaling.note: ALREADY-revenue multi-product platform scaling (e.g. AI-connectivity semis): past the binary, diversified; risk is TAM-capture magnitude

single_asset.note: one-shot: deep drawdown on failure (the trial IS the company)

platform.note: multi-shot / revenue-cushioned: a single failure is partly absorbed

_worked_example.note: Applied floor = max(A_min, fixed tier), A_min = 1 + [(1-p)L + h]/p, h = (1+0.14)^T - 1, T = max(days_to_catalyst/365, 0.5).
